description_long: This is a modern, minimalist sofa with a clean-lined silhouette and a light beige fabric upholstery. The sofa features two large, loose back cushions and a single, seamless seat cushion, both of which appear plush and inviting. The armrests are straight, medium-height, and extend from the backrest to the front edge, providing a boxy, geometric profile. The legs are short, slightly recessed, and likely made of wood, giving the sofa a subtle lift off the ground. The upholstery is smooth and solid-colored, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching. This sofa would fit well in urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered patios.
description: A modern beige sofa with straight armrests, two large back cushions, and a single seat cushion, featuring a smooth, solid fabric upholstery and short wooden legs.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two large back cushions, single seat cushion, and straight armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's boxy profile, armrest height, and cushion thickness.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unadorned backrest and the tops of the back cushions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and cushion arrangement seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose back cushions and a single, seamless seat cushion; all cushions are uniform in size and not attached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, boxy armrests at medium height, flush with the backrest and seat, with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, rectangular wooden legs positioned at the corners, slightly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions; continuous and unsegmented with no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric upholstery with no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
